ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这不会产生任何效果，但可能表明你的应用存在 bug。请改为直接赋值给 `this.state`，或在 %s 组件中定义一个包含所需状态的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`.

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.

If you used to conditionally omit it with %s={condition && value}, pass %s={condition ? value : undefined} instead.

收到了非布尔属性 `%s` 的值 `%s`。

如果你想将其写入 DOM，请改为传递字符串：%s="%s" 或 %s={value.toString()}。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillMount in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move code with side effects to componentDidMount, and set initial state in the constructor.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
不建议在严格模式下使用 UNSAFE_componentWillMount，这可能表明你的代码存在缺陷。详情请参阅 https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将具有副作用的代码移到 componentDidMount，并在构造函数中设置初始 state。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move data fetching code or side effects to componentDidUpdate.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
不建议在严格模式下使用 UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate，这可能表明你的代码存在缺陷。详情请参阅 https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将数据获取代码或副作用移到 componentDidUpdate。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.source: %s has a method called shouldComponentUpdate(). shouldComponentUpdate should not be used when extending React.PureComponent. Please extend React.Component if shouldComponentUpdate is used.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 shouldComponentUpdate() 的方法。在继承 React.PureComponent 时不应使用 shouldComponentUpdate。如果使用了 shouldComponentUpdate，请继承 React.Component。

ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidUnmount(). But there is no such lifecycle method. Did you mean componentWillUnmount()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidUnmount() 的方法。但并没有这个生命周期方法。你是想写 componentWillUnmount() 吗？

If you meant to fetch data or run side-effects or mutations after React has updated the UI, use componentDidUpdate().
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidReceiveProps() 的方法。但并没有这个生命周期方法。如果你是想在 props 变化时更新 state，请使用 componentWillReceiveProps()。如果你是想在 React 更新 UI 后获取数据或执行副作用或变更，请使用 componentDidUpdate()。

ast.source: %s has a method called componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.target: %s 有一个名为 UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): When calling super() in `%s`, make sure to pass up the same props that your component's constructor was passed.

ast.name: error

ast.target: 不支持在 %s 上将 defaultProps 设置为实例属性，且会被忽略。请改为在 %s 上将 defaultProps 定义为静态属性。

ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromProps() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为静态方法。

ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromError() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为静态方法。

ast.target: %s：getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 被定义为静态方法，将被忽略。请改为声明为实例方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.state: must be set to an object or null
ast.target: %s.state：必须设置为对象或 null

ast.target: %s.getChildContext()：要使用 getChildContext()，必须定义 childContextTypes。

ast.target: %s 定义了无效的 contextType。contextType 应指向 React.createContext() 返回的 Context 对象。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: `%s` uses `getDerivedStateFromProps` but its initial state is %s. This is not recommended. Instead, define the initial state by assigning an object to `this.state` in the constructor of `%s`. This ensures that `getDerivedStateFromProps` arguments have a consistent shape.
ast.target: `%s` 使用了 `getDerivedStateFromProps`，但其初始 state 为 %s。不推荐这样做。请改为在 `%s` 的构造函数中给 `this.state` 赋一个对象来定义初始 state。这可确保 `getDerivedStateFromProps` 的参数形状一致。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillMount(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillMount()：直接给 this.state 赋值已废弃（组件构造函数内除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillReceiveProps()：直接给 this.state 赋值已废弃（组件构造函数内除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: It is not recommended to assign props directly to state because updates to props won't be reflected in state. In most cases, it is better to use props directly.
ast.target: %s：不建议将 props 直接赋给 state，因为 props 的更新不会反映到 state 中。大多数情况下，直接使用 props 更好。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop. See https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys for more information.
ast.target: 列表中的每个子项都应有唯一的“key”属性。更多信息请参见 https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A string ref, "%s", has been found within a strict mode tree. String refs are a source of potential bugs and should be avoided. We recommend using useRef() or createRef() instead. Learn more about using refs safely here: https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref
ast.target: 在严格模式树中发现了字符串 ref（"%s"）。字符串 ref 可能引发潜在的 bug，应避免使用。我们建议改用 useRef() 或 createRef()。了解更多安全使用 ref 的信息：https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref

ast.name: error
ast.source: Functions are not valid as a React child. This may happen if you return a Component instead of <Component /> from render. Or maybe you meant to call this function rather than return it.
ast.target: 函数不能作为 React 子项。这可能发生在你从 render 返回 Component 而不是 <Component /> 时，或者你本意是调用该函数而不是返回它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encountered two children with the same key, `%s`. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.
ast.target: 遇到两个具有相同 key（`%s`）的子项。key 应该是唯一的，以便组件在更新间保持其身份。非唯一的 key 可能导致子项被重复和/或被省略——该行为不受支持，且可能在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Using Generators as children is unsupported and will likely yield unexpected results because enumerating a generator mutates it. You may convert it to an array with `Array.from()` or the `[...spread]` operator before rendering. Keep in mind you might need to polyfill these features for older browsers.
ast.target: 不支持将 Generator 作为子项使用，因为遍历 generator 会改变它，从而可能产生意外结果。你可以在渲染前使用 `Array.from()` 或 `[...spread]` 运算符将其转换为数组。请注意，旧版浏览器可能需要为这些特性提供 polyfill。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Detected multiple renderers concurrently rendering the same mutable source. This is currently unsupported.
ast.target: 检测到多个渲染器同时渲染同一个可变源。目前不支持此用法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument that is not an array (instead, received `%s`). When specified, the final argument must be an array.
ast.target: %s 收到了一个不是数组的最后参数（实际收到 `%s`）。当指定该参数时，最后参数必须是数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
React has detected a change in the order of Hooks called by %s. This will lead to bugs and errors if not fixed. For more information, read the Rules of Hooks: https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   Previous render            Next render
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ast.target:
React 检测到 %s 调用 Hooks 的顺序发生了变化。如果不修复，这将导致 bug 和错误。更多信息请阅读 Hooks 规则：https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument during this render, but not during the previous render. Even though the final argument is optional, its type cannot change between renders.
ast.target: %s 在本次渲染中收到了最后一个参数，但在上一次渲染中没有。即使最后一个参数是可选的，它的类型也不能在渲染之间变化。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal error: Expected work-in-progress queue to be a clone. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 内部错误：期望 work-in-progress 队列是一个克隆。这是 React 的 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Mutable source should not return a function as the snapshot value. Functions may close over mutable values and cause tearing.
ast.target: 可变源不应返回函数作为快照值。函数可能会捕获可变值并导致撕裂。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Mutable source subscribe function must return an unsubscribe function.
ast.target: 可变源的订阅函数必须返回一个取消订阅函数。

ast.target: 期望 useImperativeHandle() 的第二个参数是创建 handle 的函数。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error

ast.target: useOpaqueIdentifier 返回的对象只应传递给属性。不要直接读取该值。

ast.name: error

ast.target: 来自 useState() 和 useReducer() Hooks 的状态更新不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件主体中使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎有 render 方法，但没有继承 React.Component。这可能会导致错误。请将 %s 改为继承 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to be a function component that returns a class instance. Change %s to a class that extends React.Component instead. If you can't use a class try assigning the prototype on the function as a workaround. `%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`. Don't use an arrow function since it cannot be called with `new` by React.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎是一个返回类实例的函数组件。请将 %s 改为继承 React.Component 的类。如果不能使用类，可作为变通方案在函数上指定 prototype。`%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`。不要使用箭头函数，因为 React 不能用 `new` 调用它。

ast.name: error

ast.target: %s(...): 不能在函数组件上定义 childContextTypes。

ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 getDerivedStateFromProps。

ast.name: error

ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 contextType。

ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 上 revealOrder 的有效值。请改用小写的 "%s"。

ast.name: error

ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 上 revealOrder 的有效值。React 在拼写中使用 -s 后缀。请改用 "%ss"。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.target: 向 <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" /> 传入了单独一行。这没有意义，因为它需要多行。你是否想传入多个子元素或一个数组？

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.target: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate(): 必须返回一个快照值（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.target: 为 %s 提供了意外的 ref 对象。请使用 ref-setter 函数或 React.createRef()。

ast.name: error

ast.target: unstable_flushDiscreteUpdates：当 React 已在渲染时无法刷新更新。

ast.name: error

ast.target: flushSync 在生命周期方法内部被调用。React 在已渲染时无法刷新。考虑将此调用移到调度任务或微任务中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect, but useEffect either doesn't have a dependency array, or one of the dependencies changes on every render.
ast.target: 超过最大更新深度。当组件在 useEffect 中调用 setState，而 useEffect 没有依赖数组，或某个依赖在每次渲染时都会变化时，会出现此问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't perform a React state update on a component that hasn't mounted yet. This indicates that you have a side-effect in your render function that asynchronously later calls tries to update the component. Move this work to useEffect instead.
ast.target: 无法对尚未挂载的组件执行 React 状态更新。这表明你的渲染函数中存在副作用，异步地在之后尝试更新该组件。请将此工作移至 useEffect。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update during an existing state transition (such as within `render`). Render methods should be a pure function of props and state.
ast.target: 不能在现有的状态转换期间更新（例如在 `render` 内）。渲染方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数。

ast.name: error
error
error
error
error
ast.source: Profiler must specify an "id" as a prop
ast.target: Profiler 必须通过 prop 指定一个 "id"

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Render methods should be a pure function of props and state; triggering nested component updates from render is not allowed. If necessary, trigger nested updates in componentDidUpdate.

Check the render method of %s.
ast.target:
渲染方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数；不允许从 render 触发嵌套组件更新。如有必要，请在 componentDidUpdate 中触发嵌套更新。

检查 %s 的 render 方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Expected the last optional `callback` argument to be a function. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: render(...): 期望最后一个可选的 `callback` 参数为函数，但实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): does not support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: render(...): 不支持第二个 callback 参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体内使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: unmount(...): does not support a callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: unmount(...): 不支持 callback 参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体内使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Replacing React-rendered children with a new root component. If you intended to update the children of this node, you should instead have the existing children update their state and render the new components instead of calling ReactDOM.render.
ast.target: render(...): 正在用新的根组件替换由 React 渲染的子组件。如果你想更新此节点的子组件，应让现有子组件更新其 state 并渲染新组件，而不是调用 ReactDOM.render。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(): Target node has markup rendered by React, but there are unrelated nodes as well. This is most commonly caused by white-space inserted around server-rendered markup.
ast.target: render(): 目标节点包含由 React 渲染的标记，但也有无关节点。最常见的原因是在服务器渲染的标记周围插入了空白字符。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is accessing findDOMNode inside its render(). render() should be a pure function of props and state. It should never access something that requires stale data from the previous render, such as refs. Move this logic to componentDidMount and componentDidUpdate instead.
ast.target: %s 正在其 render() 中访问 findDOMNode。render() 应该是 props 和 state 的纯函数。它不应访问需要来自上一次渲染的陈旧数据的内容，例如 refs。请将此逻辑移到 componentDidMount 和 componentDidUpdate 中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode() on a container that was previously passed to ReactDOM.createRoot(). This is not supported. Did you mean to call root.unmount()?
ast.target: 你正在对之前传给 ReactDOM.createRoot() 的容器调用 ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode()。这不受支持。你是想调用 root.unmount() 吗？

ast.name: error
